title: Be8 is The First Company in South America Certified by CARB to Supply Biodiesel to California
content: Be8, a leading biodiesel producer in Brazil, has just received CARB (California Air Resources Board) certification for the production route of biodiesel made from animal fat to California, in the United States. The Passo Fundo (RS) unit is the first in South America to receive authorization to export this production route issued by the California air quality regulatory agency.
author: Analysts Account
